Cancún, Quintana Roo  ·  México

Where the Sea
Begins.

A boutique resort and full-service marina on the shores of Cancún — where the lagoon meets the Caribbean. Rooms with a view, boats in the water, and adventure at every tide.

See the Resort Explore the Marina
MarinaCertified SEFA
KayaksCatamarans & Boats
LagoonCancún Waterfront
ResortHotel & Amenities

Marazul Resort & Marina

More than
a resort.

Nestled on the shores of Cancún's lagoon in Supermanzana 86 — Marazul is a private retreat where land and sea converge. Whether you're here to unwind in a waterfront room, launch your boat from our marina, or set out on a catamaran at sunrise, every detail is designed around the water.

Couples, families, and adventure seekers all find their place here. This is Cancún as it should be experienced — unhurried, authentic, and always close to the sea.

Plan Your Stay

Accommodations

Sleep closer
to the water.

Every room at Marazul is positioned to make the most of the Cancún landscape — lagoon views, sea breezes, and the sound of water just outside your door.

Standard

Lagoon Room

Comfortable, well-appointed rooms with private balcony overlooking the lagoon. King or twin beds, AC, flat screen, and direct access to resort amenities.

  • Private balcony · Lagoon view
  • King or twin beds
  • Air conditioning · Smart TV
Inquire →
Suite

Ocean Suite

Spacious suites with separate living area, premium furnishings, and panoramic views of the Caribbean. Ideal for couples seeking a luxury getaway.

  • Panoramic ocean & lagoon view
  • Living area · King bed
  • Jacuzzi · Premium amenities
Inquire →
Premium

Marina View Room

Wake up to boats on the water. These rooms overlook the marina directly — ideal for boat owners or anyone who lives for the sea.

  • Direct marina views
  • Private terrace
  • King bed · Resort access
Inquire →
Marina SEFA Certified

Marina & Boat Services

Your boat
deserves the
best dock.

Marazul operates a certified SEFA marina — one of the few in the Cancún area with a professional boat launch ramp, secure long-term storage, and full repair and maintenance services on-site.

Whether you're launching for a day on the water or looking for a trusted home for your vessel, our marina team has you covered year-round.

  • Certified SEFA boat launch ramp
  • Secure long-term boat storage
  • Repair & maintenance services
  • Dock space & mooring
  • Fuel supply on-site
  • Professional maritime staff
Contact the Marina

Water Activities

Adventure
at every tide.

From leisurely kayak tours to sport fishing in open water — Marazul puts you at the starting point of every great sea adventure on the Cancún lagoon.

Kayak Tours

Paddle through Cancún's lagoon at your own pace. Single and tandem kayaks available for rent — guided tours available for first-timers.

Catamaran Sailing

Set sail on our catamarans for sunset cruises, snorkeling excursions, or private half-day trips across the Caribbean coast.

Boat Rentals

Charter a small motorboat for a day of freedom on the water. Explore hidden inlets, anchor in quiet coves, or reach the open sea.

Sport Fishing

The Caribbean offers world-class fishing year-round. Our team can arrange full-day offshore trips with experienced captains and gear.

Snorkeling & Diving

The Mesoamerican reef is minutes away. Discover the underwater world of Cancún with guided snorkeling or diving excursions from the marina.

Sunset Cruise

End your day on the water as the sun dips below the lagoon horizon. A Marazul classic — cold drinks, warm light, and unforgettable views.

Life at
Marazul.

Beyond the Resort

The world is
your marina.
Navigate it cheaper.

As a Marazul member, your adventures don't stop here. Unlock up to 70% off on hotels, resort weeks, flights, and cruises in 70+ countries — one membership, endless horizons.
